title: Mario Kart 8 on Cemu 1.5.3 (Wii U Emulator)
description:
!!!THIS WAS NOT RECORDED ON A REAL WII U, ALL OF THIS IS EMULATED!!!
Cemu is a Wii U Emulator which you can find here: https://cemu.info/

There are a few hiccups, bugs, sound glitches and overall lightning issues but all in all it's running smooth at almost bang on 60 FPS! And it's kinda amazing how far they already are, the emulator isn't even a year old and running this well already!

Important Hardware Specs:
i7 3770K
GTX 970 Overclocked
16 GB RAM

I've used a XBox One controller to play, just in case you're wondering.
